# HatsonTech

> HatsonTech is a software solutions and innovation company based in ODTÜ Teknokent, Ankara, Türkiye. It designs and builds custom software, web platforms, mobile apps, cloud systems, and AI-powered products for businesses, and develops its own products. Its flagship product is FlowDesk, an all-in-one business management platform. HatsonTech also delivers software, web/mobile, AI/data and cloud solutions to businesses (custom software development, web platform development, AI & machine learning, RAG/semantic search, mobile apps, big data) — see its Çözümler/Solutions practice. Ankara-based, serving all of Türkiye.

HatsonTech Yazılım A.Ş. was founded in 2026. The company builds modern software: web platforms, mobile apps, cloud-native systems, and AI features (AI assistants, retrieval-augmented generation, machine learning, data engineering). Its own products are: **FlowDesk** (flagship all-in-one business management platform: CRM, project & task management, invoicing, and team collaboration), **HatsonAI** (its AI automation and assistant engine — document understanding, RAG assistants that cite sources, and workflow automation), and **StorePilot** (an e-commerce and retail management platform: storefront, inventory, orders, and analytics). The website is bilingual — Turkish at /faydali-bilgiler/ and English at /insights/ — with hreflang annotations. Contact: info@hatsontech.com.

## Products

- [FlowDesk — flagship business management platform](https://hatsontech.com/#projects): an all-in-one, cloud-native SaaS — CRM, project & task management, invoicing, and team collaboration for small and mid-sized businesses.
- [HatsonAI — AI engine](https://hatsontech.com/#projects): AI automation and assistant engine — document understanding, retrieval-augmented (RAG) assistants that cite their sources, and workflow automation that powers HatsonTech products and client projects.
- [StorePilot — commerce platform](https://hatsontech.com/#projects): an e-commerce and retail management platform — modern storefront, inventory and order management, and sales analytics.
- [What We Build](https://hatsontech.com/#services): the engineering capabilities behind HatsonTech's own products and client projects — Custom Software, Web & Mobile Apps, AI & Data, and Cloud & DevOps.

## Company

- [Home](https://hatsontech.com/): company overview, products, capabilities, careers, and contact.
- [About HatsonTech](https://hatsontech.com/#about): an Ankara-based software solutions and innovation company building its own software products; founders İsmail Tarık Şenkal and Halide Yılmaz. Founded 2026.
- [Technologies](https://hatsontech.com/#technologies): the software and engineering stack behind the products.
- Contact: info@hatsontech.com — ODTÜ Teknokent, 06510 Çankaya, Ankara, Türkiye.
- Social: x.com/hatsontech, linkedin.com/company/hatsontech, instagram.com/hatsontech, github.com/HatsonTech

## Insights — educational articles (English)

- [Reasoning AI Models: How 'Thinking' Models Actually Work](https://hatsontech.com/insights/akil-yuruten-reasoning-modeller.html): What are reasoning AI models and how do 'thinking' models work? A plain-language guide to chain-of-thought, test-time compute, and when this extra thinking is actually worth it.
- [What Is MCP (Model Context Protocol)? The Standard Connecting AI to Tools](https://hatsontech.com/insights/model-context-protocol-mcp.html): What is MCP (Model Context Protocol), why does it matter, and how does it work? A plain-language guide to the open standard that connects AI to tools and data sources, using a USB-C analogy.
- [Context Engineering: Beyond Prompt Engineering](https://hatsontech.com/insights/baglam-muhendisligi-context-engineering.html): What is context engineering and how is it different from prompt engineering? A plain-language guide to designing the whole context a model sees, the context window, and the 'lost in the middle' effect.
- [Small Language Models (SLMs) and Edge AI: Is Small Always Weak?](https://hatsontech.com/insights/kucuk-dil-modelleri-slm.html): What are small language models (SLMs), and when are they a smarter choice than a large model? A plain-language guide to speed, cost, privacy, edge deployment, and distillation.
- [Multi-Agent Systems: From a Single Agent to an AI Team](https://hatsontech.com/insights/coklu-ajan-multi-agent-sistemler.html): What are multi-agent systems, and why use more than one agent? A plain-language guide to orchestrator-worker, pipeline, and debate patterns, plus the costs and pitfalls.

- [What Are Large Language Models (LLMs) and How Do They Work?](https://hatsontech.com/insights/llm-nedir-nasil-calisir.html): What is a large language model (LLM) and how does it work? A plain-language guide to next-token prediction, training, parameters, context windows, and why models hallucinate.
- [Tokens, Embeddings and Vectors: How AI Turns Language Into Numbers](https://hatsontech.com/insights/token-embedding-vektor.html): How does AI turn language into numbers? A plain-English guide to tokens, embeddings and vectors, from tokenization to vector space and cosine similarity.
- [Prompt Engineering: A Practical Guide to Getting Better Answers from AI](https://hatsontech.com/insights/prompt-muhendisligi.html): What is prompt engineering and how do you get better answers from AI? A practical guide to clear instructions, context, few-shot examples, roles, and step-by-step thinking with real examples.
- [RAG or Fine-Tuning? Which to Use and When](https://hatsontech.com/insights/rag-vs-fine-tuning.html): What RAG and fine-tuning really are, how they work, and when to use each. A clear comparison across freshness, cost, control, and hallucination, plus how to combine them well.
- [AI Hallucination: Why Models Make Things Up and How to Reduce It](https://hatsontech.com/insights/yapay-zeka-halusinasyon.html): What is AI hallucination, why do LLMs confidently make things up, and how do you reduce it with grounding/RAG, citations, evaluation and human review? A clear, plain-language guide.
- [The Transformer Architecture, Explained Simply](https://hatsontech.com/insights/transformer-mimarisi.html): Understand the Transformer in plain language: the self-attention intuition, why it replaced RNNs, the encoder-decoder split, and why it scales so remarkably well.
- [AI Agents and Tool Use: From Chatbot to AI That Actually Does Things](https://hatsontech.com/insights/yapay-zeka-ajanlari.html): What is an AI agent and how does it differ from a chatbot? The plan-act-observe loop, tool calling, RAG, APIs and the MCP standard, plus autonomy and safety, explained with practical examples.
- [Vector Databases and Semantic Search: How a Computer Finds "Meaning"](https://hatsontech.com/insights/vektor-veritabani-anlamsal-arama.html): What is semantic search, how does it differ from keyword search, how do embeddings and HNSW work, what does a vector database do, and why does re-ranking matter? A clear guide with practical examples.
- [AI Ethics, Bias, and Safety: A Calm, Practical Guide](https://hatsontech.com/insights/yapay-zeka-etigi-onyargi.html): A calm, practical look at AI ethics, bias, and safety: how bias enters through data and labels, plus fairness, transparency, privacy (KVKK/GDPR), and where the EU AI Act heads in 2026.
- [AI in Law: Opportunities, Risks, and Responsibility](https://hatsontech.com/insights/hukukta-yapay-zeka.html): How AI speeds up legal research, drafting, and review, plus the real risks: hallucinated citations, confidentiality, and over-reliance. A clear guide to grounding, RAG, and human oversight.
- [AI at Work: A Calm, Practical Productivity Guide](https://hatsontech.com/insights/yapay-zeka-verimlilik.html): Practical ways to actually use AI in daily work: writing, summarizing, research, brainstorming, coding, and email. A concrete guide to delegating well and verifying what it gives you.
- [Multimodal AI: How One Model Understands Text, Images and Sound at Once](https://hatsontech.com/insights/cok-modlu-yapay-zeka.html): What is multimodal AI and how does it work? How does one model look at an image and read its text together? We explain vision, audio and document understanding via a shared meaning space with simple analogies.
- [How Do We Know an AI Model Is Good? Benchmarks and Evaluation](https://hatsontech.com/insights/yapay-zeka-degerlendirme.html): How are AI models evaluated? Benchmarks, contamination, task-specific tests, LLM judges and hallucination metrics explained simply, with real-world legal examples.
- [Open Source or Closed Model? AI's Big Trade-off, Explained](https://hatsontech.com/insights/acik-kaynak-kapali-modeller.html): What are open-weight and closed/API AI models, and how do they differ? A clear comparison across control, privacy, cost, and capability, plus the 2026 landscape.
- [AI and Data Privacy: Where Does Everything You Type Actually Go?](https://hatsontech.com/insights/yapay-zeka-veri-gizliligi.html): Where does your data go when you use AI? Learn in plain language the training vs inference difference, cloud–on-prem options, KVKK and GDPR basics, anonymization, and practical privacy tips for individuals and companies.
- [AI for Businesses: Where to Start Without the Hype](https://hatsontech.com/insights/isletmeler-icin-yapay-zeka.html): Where should your business start with AI? An honest, hype-free guide to picking a real problem, starting small, measuring, build vs buy, data readiness and ROI.
- [The Future of AI and the AGI Debate: Separating Signal from Hype](https://hatsontech.com/insights/yapay-zekanin-gelecegi-agi.html): What is AGI, and where do we really stand today? Agentic AI, optimistic versus cautious views, genuine near-term impact versus hype, and what to actually watch — a balanced, non-sensational guide.
- [caseon.ai — Rebuilding legal research in Türkiye with AI](https://hatsontech.com/insights/caseon-ai.html): caseon.ai is an AI-powered legal research platform — semantic case-law search, document analysis and a citing legal assistant, built on large language models and RAG and powered by HatsonAI.
- [Grounding LLMs in Your Business Data with RAG](https://hatsontech.com/insights/rag-turkce-hukuk-verisi.html): How to ground LLMs in your business data with RAG: chunking, embeddings, vector search, re-ranking and source citations — the retrieval engineering HatsonTech uses.
- [AI for Turkish: The Challenges and Opportunities of Turkish NLP](https://hatsontech.com/insights/turkce-yapay-zeka-nlp.html): Why does Turkish challenge AI models? Agglutination, rich inflection, tokenization costs and scarce quality data. A clear look at Turkish NLP's hurdles and openings.

## Faydalı Bilgiler — eğitici yazılar (Türkçe)

- [Akıl Yürüten Yapay Zeka Modelleri: 'Düşünen' Modeller Nasıl Çalışır?](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/akil-yuruten-reasoning-modeller.html): Akıl yürüten (reasoning) yapay zeka modelleri nedir, 'düşünen' modeller nasıl çalışır? Zincirleme akıl yürütme, test-zamanı hesaplama ve bunların ne zaman gerektiğini sade bir dille anlatıyoruz.
- [MCP (Model Context Protocol) Nedir? Yapay Zekayı Araçlara Bağlayan Standart](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/model-context-protocol-mcp.html): MCP (Model Context Protocol) nedir, neden önemli ve nasıl çalışır? Yapay zekayı araçlara ve veri kaynaklarına bağlayan açık standardı, USB-C benzetmesiyle sade bir dille anlatıyoruz.
- [Bağlam Mühendisliği (Context Engineering): Prompt'un Ötesi](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/baglam-muhendisligi-context-engineering.html): Bağlam mühendisliği (context engineering) nedir, prompt mühendisliğinden farkı ne? Modelin gördüğü bağlamın tamamını tasarlamayı, bağlam penceresini ve 'ortada kaybolma' etkisini sade anlatıyoruz.
- [Küçük Dil Modelleri (SLM) ve Uç Yapay Zeka: Küçük Her Zaman Zayıf mı?](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/kucuk-dil-modelleri-slm.html): Küçük dil modelleri (SLM) nedir, ne zaman büyük modelden daha akıllı bir seçimdir? Hız, maliyet, gizlilik ve uçta çalışma avantajlarını ve damıtmayı sade bir dille anlatıyoruz.
- [Çoklu-Ajan (Multi-Agent) Sistemler: Tek Ajandan Yapay Zeka Ekibine](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/coklu-ajan-multi-agent-sistemler.html): Çoklu-ajan (multi-agent) sistemler nedir, neden birden çok ajan kullanılır? Orkestratör-işçi, pipeline ve tartışma desenlerini, maliyet ve tuzaklarını sade bir dille anlatıyoruz.

- [Büyük Dil Modelleri (LLM) Nedir ve Nasıl Çalışır?](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/llm-nedir-nasil-calisir.html): Büyük dil modeli (LLM) nedir, nasıl çalışır? Sonraki kelime tahmini, eğitim, parametreler, bağlam penceresi ve halüsinasyonu sade, örneklerle dolu bir dille anlatıyoruz.
- [Token, Embedding ve Vektör: Yapay Zeka Dili Nasıl Sayıya Çeviriyor?](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/token-embedding-vektor.html): Token, embedding ve vektör nedir? Yapay zeka dili nasil sayiya cevirir? Tokenizasyon, vektor uzayi ve kosinus benzerligini sade analojilerle anlatan rehber.
- [Prompt Mühendisliği: Yapay Zekadan Daha İyi Cevaplar Almanın Pratik Yolları](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/prompt-muhendisligi.html): Prompt mühendisliği nedir, yapay zekadan nasıl daha iyi cevap alınır? Net talimat, bağlam, az-örnekli yaklaşım, rol istemleri ve adım adım düşünmeyi örneklerle anlatan rehber.
- [RAG mı, İnce Ayar mı? Hangisini Ne Zaman Seçmeli](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/rag-vs-fine-tuning.html): RAG ve ince ayar (fine-tuning) nedir, nasıl çalışır, hangi durumda hangisini seçmelisiniz? Güncellik, maliyet, kontrol ve halüsinasyon ekseninde net bir karşılaştırma ve ikisini birleştirmenin yolu.
- [Yapay Zekâ Halüsinasyonu: Modeller Neden Uydurur ve Bunu Nasıl Azaltırız?](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/yapay-zeka-halusinasyon.html): Yapay zekâ halüsinasyonu nedir, LLM'ler neden kendinden emin uydurur ve bunu grounding/RAG, kaynak gösterimi, değerlendirme ve insan denetimiyle nasıl azaltırız? Sade bir rehber.
- [Transformer Mimarisi, Sade Bir Dille](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/transformer-mimarisi.html): Transformer mimarisini sade bir dille öğrenin: öz-dikkat sezgisi, RNN'lerin yerini neden aldığı, kodlayıcı-çözücü yapısı ve neden bu kadar iyi ölçeklendiği.
- [Yapay Zeka Ajanları ve Araç Kullanımı: Sohbet Botundan Eyleme Geçen Yapay Zekaya](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/yapay-zeka-ajanlari.html): Yapay zeka ajanı nedir, sohbet botundan farkı ne? Planla-uygula-gözlemle döngüsü, araç çağırma, RAG, API'ler ve MCP standardı; otonomi ile güvenlik pratik örneklerle sade anlatım.
- [Vektör Veritabanları ve Anlamsal Arama: Bilgisayar "Anlam"ı Nasıl Bulur?](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/vektor-veritabani-anlamsal-arama.html): Anlamsal arama nedir, anahtar kelime aramasından farkı ne, embedding ve HNSW nasıl çalışır, vektör veritabanı ne işe yarar ve yeniden sıralama neden gerekir? Pratik örneklerle sade bir rehber.
- [Yapay Zekâ Etiği, Önyargı ve Güvenlik: Sakin ve Pratik Bir Rehber](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/yapay-zeka-etigi-onyargi.html): Yapay zekâ etiği, önyargı ve güvenliğe sakin bir bakış: önyargı veriden ve etiketlerden nasıl doğar, adalet, şeffaflık, mahremiyet (KVKK/GDPR) ve AB Yapay Zekâ Yasası 2026'da nereye gidiyor?
- [Hukukta Yapay Zeka: Fırsatlar, Riskler ve Sorumluluk](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/hukukta-yapay-zeka.html): Yapay zeka hukukta araştırma, taslak ve incelemeyi nasıl hızlandırır? Uydurma atıf, gizlilik ve aşırı güven risklerini; topraklama (grounding), RAG ve insan denetimini anlaşılır biçimde anlatıyoruz.
- [Günlük İşte Yapay Zeka: Sakin Bir Verimlilik Rehberi](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/yapay-zeka-verimlilik.html): Yapay zekayı günlük işinizde gerçekten verimli kullanmanın yolları: yazma, özetleme, araştırma, fikir üretme, kod ve e-posta. İyi devretme ve doğrulama üzerine somut bir rehber.
- [Çok Modlu Yapay Zeka: Bir Model Metni, Görseli ve Sesi Aynı Anda Nasıl Anlıyor?](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/cok-modlu-yapay-zeka.html): Çok modlu (multimodal) yapay zeka nedir, nasıl çalışır? Bir model görsele bakıp metni nasıl birlikte okur? Görü, ses ve belge anlamayı ortak bir anlam uzayıyla sade analojilerle açıklıyoruz.
- [Bir Yapay Zekânın "İyi" Olduğunu Nereden Biliyoruz? Benchmark'lar ve Değerlendirme](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/yapay-zeka-degerlendirme.html): Yapay zekâ modelleri nasıl değerlendirilir? Benchmark'lar, kontaminasyon, görev odaklı testler, LLM yargıçlar ve halüsinasyon ölçümü sade bir dille anlatılıyor.
- [Açık Kaynak mı, Kapalı Model mi? Yapay Zekânın Büyük Tercihi](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/acik-kaynak-kapali-modeller.html): Açık ağırlıklı ve kapalı/API yapay zekâ modelleri nedir, nasıl farklılaşır? Kontrol, gizlilik, maliyet ve yetenek ekseninde net bir karşılaştırma ve 2026 manzarası.
- [Yapay Zekâ ve Veri Gizliliği: Yazdığınız Her Şey Nereye Gidiyor?](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/yapay-zeka-veri-gizliligi.html): Yapay zekâ kullanırken veriniz nereye gidiyor? Eğitim ve çıkarım farkı, bulut–on-prem seçenekleri, KVKK ve GDPR temelleri, anonimleştirme ve birey ile şirketler için pratik ipuçlarını sade bir dille öğrenin.
- [İşletmeler İçin Yapay Zeka: Hype Olmadan Nereden Başlamalı](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/isletmeler-icin-yapay-zeka.html): İşletmeniz yapay zekaya nereden başlamalı? Doğru problemi seçme, küçük başlama, ölçme, satın al-yap kararı, veri ve ROI üzerine dürüst, hype'sız bir rehber.
- [Yapay Zekanın Geleceği ve AGI Tartışması: Gürültüyü Sinyalden Ayırmak](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/yapay-zekanin-gelecegi-agi.html): AGI (genel yapay zeka) nedir, bugün gerçekten nerede duruyoruz? Ajansal yapay zeka, iyimser ve temkinli görüşler, yakın vadeli etki ile hype arasındaki farkı dengeli, abartısız anlatıyoruz.
- [caseon.ai — Türkiye'de hukuki araştırmayı yapay zekayla yeniden kuruyoruz](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/caseon-ai.html): caseon.ai; yapay zeka destekli bir hukuki araştırma platformudur — anlamsal içtihat araması, belge analizi ve kaynak gösteren hukuki asistan; büyük dil modelleri ve RAG ile, HatsonAI tarafından güçlendirilir.
- [İşletme Verinizde LLM'leri RAG ile Sağlamlaştırmak](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/rag-turkce-hukuk-verisi.html): İşletme verinizde LLM'leri RAG ile nasıl sağlamlaştırırsınız: parçalama, embedding, vektör arama, yeniden sıralama ve kaynak gösterimi — HatsonTech'in kullandığı erişim mühendisliği.
- [Türkçe için Yapay Zeka: Türkçe Doğal Dil İşlemenin Zorlukları ve Fırsatları](https://hatsontech.com/faydali-bilgiler/turkce-yapay-zeka-nlp.html): Türkçenin sondan eklemeli yapısı, zengin çekimi, tokenizasyon ve veri sorunları yapay zekayı neden zorlar? Türkçe NLP'nin zorluklarını ve fırsatlarını inceliyoruz.

## Çözümler / Solutions (services for businesses)

- [Çözümler & Hizmetler (TR)](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/) · [Solutions & Services (EN)](https://hatsontech.com/solutions/): HatsonTech brings the engineering capability behind its own software products (FlowDesk, HatsonAI, StorePilot) to client projects. Ankara-based, serving all of Türkiye.
- Custom Software Development — web apps, internal dashboards, APIs, microservices, cloud-based systems and integrations.
- LLM Training & Fine-Tuning — domain-specific language models, Turkish NLP, fine-tuning and adaptation to enterprise data.
- Computer Vision & Image Recognition — object recognition, OCR, document/image analysis, visual quality control, video analytics.
- RAG & Enterprise Semantic Search — semantic search over corporate documents and AI assistants that cite their sources.
- Mobile App Development — iOS, Android and cross-platform AI-powered apps, end to end.
- Big Data & Data Engineering — data pipelines, warehousing, analytics infrastructure and data cleaning.
- Service pages: [Custom Software](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/ozel-yazilim-gelistirme.html), [LLM Training & Fine-Tuning](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/buyuk-dil-modeli-egitimi.html), [Computer Vision](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/goruntu-tanima-bilgisayarli-goru.html), [RAG & Semantic Search](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/rag-anlamsal-arama-cozumleri.html), [Mobile App Development](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/mobil-uygulama-gelistirme.html), [Big Data & Data Engineering](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/buyuk-veri-veri-muhendisligi.html).
- Service areas (Ankara-based, all of Türkiye): [Ankara](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/ankara.html), [İstanbul](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/istanbul.html), [İzmir](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/izmir.html), [Türkiye](https://hatsontech.com/cozumler/turkiye-geneli.html).

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://hatsontech.com/privacy-policy.html): how HatsonTech handles personal data (KVKK + GDPR).
- [Terms of Service](https://hatsontech.com/terms-of-service.html): website terms of use.
- [Cookie Policy](https://hatsontech.com/cookie-policy.html): cookies and local storage used by the site.
